# James Nidecker

> Geometric, mandala, and blackout tattoo artist based in Amsterdam, working from Ink District Amsterdam. Over 13 years of experience creating custom geometric and mandala tattoo designs.

James Nidecker specializes in three disciplines: geometric tattoos (precise, mathematical compositions), mandala tattoos (intricate, symmetrical sacred geometry), and blackout tattoos (bold, solid black work). Based in Amsterdam city centre, working with clients from around the world on fully custom designs.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://jamesnidecker.com): Portfolio, studio info, process, and booking
- [Blog](https://jamesnidecker.com/blog): Articles on geometric and mandala tattoo topics

## Contact & booking

- Book a session: https://book.useblink.app/ink-district/james-nidecker?theme=light
- Email: info@jamesnidecker.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/jamesnidecker
- Studio: Ink District Amsterdam, Amsterdam city centre

## Notes

- All portfolio work is original, custom-designed for each client.
- Consultations are free and typically 30 minutes.
